subject: Commonly Used Discrete Random Variables
topic: §21 Poisson Approximation to the Binomial Distribution
question: 1000 cancer patients are receving a clinical trial drug for cancer. Side eﬀects are being studied. The probability that a patient experiences side eﬀects to the drug is found to be 0.001. Find the probability that none of the patients administered the trial drug experienced any side eﬀect.
